scenario_description: Agent composes outreach to Series A fintech CTO after 3 conversation turns; must avoid vendor-speak while credibly addressing offshore-perception concern.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series A funding closed Q2 2025, hiring AI product managers, interim VP Eng departure signals permanent CTO search.

required_signal_references: Series A close aligns with hiring velocity

failure_mode_targeted: P-010 & P-011: Turn-4 vendor-speak and offshore-perception objection handling

judge_scores.reasoning: Scenario is logically consistent with realistic hiring context, ground truth elements are verifiable with clear banned phrases and required components, but tone markers introduce some subjective ambiguity.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end excellence|proven methodology|best-in-class|leverage talent|comprehensive solution|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: Series A close aligns with hiring velocity|AI leadership gap common post-interim-leadership

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
